title: Aluminum Foil Trays Containers Aluminium with Paper Lids 1500ml. Great for Baking Food Storage Takeaway Tins (20 Pack)
features: GREAT FOR FOOD PACKAGING - convenient; these affordable long durable oblong Aluminum Trays by Superior is essential for leftovers, picnics, freezing, bbq, chafers, buffet serving kitsfood gifting for a friend & food service & are made from eco friendly recycalble aluminu

CONVENIENTLY REUSABLE & DISPOSABLE - Aluminum take-out containers allow you to cooking baking rosting frying and serve all in the same oven and freezer safe foil pan! And you can also send guests home with leftovers without worrying about getting your aluminum tray back! Dispose of the foil packaging when you don't feel like cleaning, or easily hand wash and use them later as they are reusable!

KEEP FOOD FRESH LONGER - Promote your restaurant or catering business by serving your take-away foods in almost dine in condition! This set of to go containers will ensure that entrees and appetizers stay hot until your customers get home. Even better, they can quickly reheat their food by placing the foil tray right in the oven!

SUPER HIGH QUALITY - This aluminum foil trays is super thick not flimsy sturdy grip for easy handling and serving you only need to use one to save you money & to make sure your food does not end up on the floor, made from eco-friendly recyclable aluminum.
PACKAGE CONTAINS - 20 foil trays & and 20 Paper foil Lined lids, Each tray measures 25x 12cm and 70mm in depth made from eco-friendly recyclable aluminum.
